title: Day 1: Introduction
scripture_text: And my God will meet all your needs according to the riches of his glory in Christ Jesus.
reflection: In Chapter 1, "Introduction," Shawn writes: "Hopefully this will open your eyes to see how God is having an impact on and in your life." This chapter of Running From Miracles reveals how God was working even in the middle of what looked like chaos. As you read today, look for the places in your own life where God has been quietly showing up — disguising miracles as ordinary moments.
prayer: God, some days faith feels easy, and other days it takes everything I have to believe. Meet me in the in-between. Strengthen what is weak and steady what is shaking. I choose to trust You today — not because I see the way forward, but because You do. In Jesus' name, Amen.
action_step: Set a 5-minute timer and sit in silence. No music, no phone, no agenda. Just listen for that still small voice. Write down whatever comes to mind.
podcast_topic: Episode idea: "Introduction" — what it means to have nothing and still find everything in God's provision. Raw conversation about how this chapter of Shawn's life connects to what listeners are going through today.
